text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: We are here again this year at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will come out on top of this year's Triple
Crown tour?

text_block_list.name: Excited Spectator
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be Special Week! There's no way she
can lose!

text_block_list.name: Fidgety Spectator
text_block_list.text:
You really think so? I have high hopes for Seiun
Sky.

text_block_list.name: Fidgety Spectator
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... But who would actually win? Hmmm, considering the distance...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's betting on those two, even though I'm
the star here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm not giving up this victory, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a first-rate Umamusume, I will certainly be
victorious in this year's Classics.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know. But I won't let my guard down until I've
left everyone in the dust and the race is over.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Well, it's time. I'll see you afterwards.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You know where to catch me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll meet you in the winner's circle.
